news.summary: Vornado Realty Trust disclosed on June 5, 2025, that their joint venture, in which they hold a 50.1% stake, successfully finalized a $675 million refinancing deal for Independence Plaza. Located in Manhattan's Tribeca submarket, the residential complex boasts 1,328 units. The newly acquired loan is set for five years with interest only payments and will mature in June 2030. The fixed rate settled at 5.84%, a step up from the prior loan which was at 4.25%. The former loan, amounting to $675 million, was supposed to mature in July 2025.
news.headline: Vornado Realty Trust refinances Independence Plaza residential complex in Manhattan for $675 million at 5.84% fixed rate.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Samsara Inc. ("Samsara") (NYSE: IOT) has reported robust financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026. The company's Q1 FY26 showcased significant progress with a focus on supporting frontline workers and revolutionizing physical operations. Samsara wrapped up the quarter with $1.54 billion in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR), indicating a 31% increase compared to the previous year when adjusted for constant currency fluctuations. This achievement highlights Samsara's ongoing success and resilience in the market.
news.headline: Samsara reports $1.54B in ARR, 31% YoY growth in Q1 FY26, continuing success in transforming operations.

news.summary: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) has released a new visual report on June 5, 2025, incorporating VantageScore® 3.0 credit scores and user-friendly graphics. This report aims to provide U.S. consumers with a clear overview of their current and previous credit activities. The initiative intends to simplify the comprehension of credit history for individuals.
news.headline: Equifax launches new U.S. consumer credit report with VantageScore® 3.0 and user-friendly graphics. Better monitoring.

news.summary: Plume Network recently announced the launch of their Genesis Mainnet, valued at $150 million, in collaboration with YZi Labs and Galaxy Ventures. The Genesis Mainnet aims to lead the way in developing the RWAfi ecosystem.
news.headline: Plume Network introduces $150M Genesis Mainnet with YZi Labs and Galaxy Ventures' backing to pioneer RWAfi Ecosystem.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, Bessor Minerals Inc. (TSXV: BST.H) announced the appointment of Dr. Zigmunt Hancyk to their Board of Directors, following the resignation of Kieran Downes on May 7, 2025. Dr. Hancyk's appointment is pending approval from the TSX Venture Exchange. This change signifies an important development for the Corporation, as they continue to strengthen their leadership team.
news.headline: Bessor Minerals Inc announces Dr. Zigmunt Hancyk appointed to the Board, replacing Kieran Downes  who resigned on May 7, 2025.

news.summary: Sprinklr, Inc (NYSE: CXM) exceeded expectations in their fiscal first-quarter 2026 results. They reported quarterly sales of $205.5 million, surpassing the analyst consensus of $203.3 million. Additionally, their adjusted EPS of 12 cents exceeded the expected $0.10. Subscription revenue saw a 3.8% year-over-year increase, amounting to $184.13 million. Looking ahead, Sprinklr anticipates fiscal 2026 revenue of $825.00 million to $827.00 million, raised from the previous estimate of $821.50 million to $823.50 million. The company also foresees subscription revenue of $741 million to $743 million and adjusted EPS of $0.39 to $0.40, up from the previous guidance of $0.38 to $0.39. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Sprinklr's fiscal Q1 2026 revenue beats estimates at $205.5M, with adjusted EPS of $0.12. Subscription revenue grows 3.8% Y/Y to $184.13M. Fiscal 2026 revenue expected at $825M-$827M. Subscription revenue projected at $741M-$743M. Adjusted EPS raised to $0.39-$0.40.

news.summary: Quanex Building Products Corporation reported its financial results for the three months ended April 30, 2025. Net sales for this period were $452.5 million, a significant increase of 70% from the same period in 2024, mainly due to the contribution from the Tyman acquisition. The company's gross margin percentage also saw an improvement, reaching 29%. Net income was $20.5 million, and adjusted net income was $27.9 million. Adjusted EBITDA for the period was $61.9 million, reflecting a margin of 13.7%. Quanex's free cash flow was $13.6 million for the quarter. The company's total debt stood at $785.0 million as of April 30, 2025, with a leverage ratio of 3.2x. Quanex utilized its low stock price to repurchase over $23 million worth of shares during the quarter. The company reiterated its guidance for fiscal 2025, expecting net sales of approximately $1.84 billion to $1.86 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $270 million to $280 million. The management expressed confidence in the company's ability to adapt to the challenging macroeconomic environment and achieve its financial targets. They emphasized the focus on integration, synergies, and cash flow generation moving forward. Additionally, Quanex's liquidity as of April 30, 2025, was $289.0 million. The company's outlook remains positive, reaffirming its guidance and commitment to delivering value to its stakeholders.
news.headline: Quanex Building Products reports revenue growth: Net sales up 70% to $452.5 million in Q2 2025; $852.5 million for H1. Adjusted EBITDA reaches $61.9 million for Q2. Integration of Tyman ahead, targeting $45 million cost synergies vs original $30 million, expecting to reach target by early fiscal 2026. Repurchased $23 million in shares. Liquidity at $289 million. Reaffirms full year guidance: $1.84 - $1.86 billion in net sales and $270 - $280 million in Adjusted EBITDA for 2025. Share repurchase program with $35.6 million remaining.

news.summary: Samsara Inc., a leading provider of the Connected Operations® Platform, recently disclosed their financial performance for the quarter ending May 3, 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE under the symbol IOT, achieved notable success in Q1 with a revenue of $366.9 million, marking a significant 32% increase compared to the previous year when adjusted for currency fluctuations. Interested parties can access further details in the shareholder letter posted on the Samsara investor relations website at investors.samsara.com. Sanjit Biswas, the CEO and co-founder of Samsara, expressed satisfaction with the strong start to the fiscal year.
news.headline: Samsara Inc. reports Q1 fiscal year 2026 revenue of $366.9M, up 32% YoY in constant currency. CEO Sanjit Biswas pleased.

news.summary: TerThera B.V., based in Breda, Netherlands, announced the launch of the first GMP-compliant Terbium-161 NCA product on June 5, 2025. This launch marks a significant milestone in the production of this radionuclide on a commercial scale. Terbium-161 NCA is known for its promising applications, and this move by TerThera sets a new standard in the industry. This development is poised to have a major impact, as it opens up opportunities for further advancements and research in this field.
news.headline: TerThera achieves GMP status for Terbium-161 product, enhancing clinical access by meeting quality standards. 91 characters.

news.summary: In Elgin, Illinois, John B. Sanflippo & Son, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBSS) shared that CEO Jeffrey T. Sanfilippo and Vice President/Corporate Controller Michael J. Finn are set to speak at the East Coast IDEAS Investor Conference on June 12, 2025, at The Westin Times Square in New York, NY. Their presentation is slated to start at 2:00 p.m. ET and will be available via webcast through the conference host's primary website.
news.headline: John B. Sanfilippo & Son, Inc. to present at East Coast IDEAS Investor Conference on June 12 in NYC at 2:00 p.m. ET. CEO and VP to host 1x1 meetings.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Guess?, Inc. (NYSE: GES) released their financial results for the first quarter ending May 3, 2025. CEO Carlos Alberini expressed positivity towards the quarter’s performance, surpassing expectations in important metrics. Revenue saw a 9% uptick in U.S. dollars and a 12% increase in constant currency. This growth was attributed to the effective merging of rag & bone and ongoing success in wholesale ventures across Europe and the Americas.
news.headline: Guess?, Inc. reported strong first quarter fiscal year 2026 results, with 9% revenue growth in USD and 12% in constant currency.

news.summary: In Miami, World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) disclosed a rise in their quarterly cash dividend to $0.20 per share, marking an 18% increase from the former payout of $0.17 per share. Shareholders of record on June 17, 2025, will receive this dividend on July 16, 2025. Ira M. Birns, President and Chief Financial Officer, highlighted the company's substantial return to shareholders amounting to nearly $500 million in dividends and share repurchases over the last five years.
news.headline: World Kinect Corporation raises its quarterly cash dividend by 18%, now $0.20 per share. $500 million returned to shareholders in 5 years.

news.summary: Hapbee Technologies, Inc. is settling a debt of $235,954.48 by issuing 2,621,716 common shares at $0.09 per share to suppliers and consultants. The debt is for unpaid fees related to goods, products, and consulting services previously provided to the company. This settlement aims to conserve cash for future operations, with the board of directors unanimously approving the decision, pending TSX Venture Exchange acceptance.
news.headline: Hapbee settles $235,954.48 debt by issuing 2,621,716 shares at $0.09/share, aiming to preserve cash for future operations.

news.summary: The European fenestration segment is currently experiencing an anticipated increase in activity, with volume growth showing positive results. This growth is largely attributed to the recent acquisition of Tyman, which has contributed significantly to the overall performance. The integration of Tyman into the company is progressing faster than expected. As a result, the cost synergy target has been raised to approximately $45 million.
news.headline: Quanex Building Products reports Q2 2025 results, reaffirms full year guidance. Cost synergy target raised to ~$45M, tyman acquisition boosts European fenestration segment.

news.summary: A new joint venture is set to significantly boost FTAI's global maintenance capacity by approximately 40%. This partnership will enhance the company's ability to provide maintenance services on a larger scale, supporting their expansion efforts and meeting the growing demand for their services worldwide. The increase in maintenance capacity is a strategic move that will strengthen FTAI's position in the market and allow them to better serve their customers.
news.headline: FTAI Aviation Ltd. closed QuickTurn Europe JV to raise maintenance capacity by around 40%, benefitting global operations.

news.summary: Progress is being made in the establishment of the inaugural industry-scale facility dedicated to recycling solar panels. This initiative aims to address the increasing need for sustainable disposal methods as the solar energy sector continues to expand. The facility is set to process an estimated number of [specific number] solar panels annually, contributing significantly to the reduction of electronic waste. This advancement highlights a positive step towards a more environmentally conscious approach within the renewable energy industry.
news.headline: Comstock Metals gets expanded storage permit for recycling facility, speeding up industry-scale solar panel development.

news.summary: Colmar, Pennsylvania - On June 5, 2025, Dorman Products, Inc. disclosed that David M. Hession, the Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will be retiring later this year. The company, listed as (NASDAQ:DORM), has begun a thorough search, aided by a prominent executive search firm, to find a suitable replacement for Mr. Hession. He will continue in his current role until a successor is appointed, after which he will offer advisory support to guarantee a seamless handover process.
news.headline: David M. Hession, CFO of Dorman Products, Inc., to retire later this year. Search process underway for his successor.

news.summary: A recent collaboration has emerged, merging EagleView's accurate aerial data with ServiceTitan's estimating and proposal features. This integration aims to enhance workflows, ultimately leading to improved close rates. By combining EagleView's precise aerial data with ServiceTitan's capabilities, the integration streamlines operations and drives higher close rates for businesses. This collaboration is set to transform the way companies operate by leveraging the strengths of both platforms. With this partnership, businesses can expect more efficient processes and potentially higher success rates in closing deals.
news.headline: ServiceTitan partners with EagleView for aerial data integration to streamline workflows, driving higher close rates.

news.summary: In the second quarter, a revenue of $15,004 million was reported, showing a 20 percent increase compared to the same period last year. The GAAP net income for the quarter was $4,965 million, while the non-GAAP net income reached $7,787 million. Additionally, an adjusted EBITDA of $10,001 million was recorded for the quarter, which represents 67 percent of...
news.headline: Broadcom Inc. reports Q2 revenue at $15B, up 20% YOY. GAAP net income $4.9B; Non-GAAP $7.8B. Adjusted EBITDA $10B.

news.summary: lululemon athletica inc. revealed its financial performance for the initial quarter of fiscal 2025, concluding on May 4, 2025. With Calvin McDonald, the Chief Executive Officer, announcing positive results, the company experienced growth in various areas such as channels, categories, and markets, notably in the U.S. This indicates the robust and adaptable nature of the business model. Moreover, customer reception towards product innovations, fresh additions, and brand initiatives was favorable.
news.headline: lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) reports growth in Q1 fiscal 2025 ended May 4, 2025. CEO Calvin McDonald highlights growth across channels, categories, and markets, including the U.S.

news.summary: In Hanover, Pennsylvania, Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ) disclosed that the company, known for producing branded salty snacks, declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of around $0.061 per share on its Class A Common Stock. The dividend payment, anticipated to be approximately on July 3, 2025, is set to be distributed to stockholders recorded as of June 16, 2025. This announcement came as the company reiterated its position as a small-cap value Staples equity.
news.headline: Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ) declares a quarterly cash dividend of $0.061 per share on Class A Common Stock. Payment on July 3, 2025.

news.summary: In City of Industry, California, Torrid Holdings Inc., a leading direct-to-consumer brand on the NYSE as CURV, catering to women sizes 10 to 30 in North America, shared its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on May 3, 2025. The company's CEO, Lisa Harper, expressed satisfaction with their advancements in strategic goals during this period. The first-quarter results matched projections, with a reported revenue of $266 million.
news.headline: Torrid reports Q1 2025 results, revenue of $266 million. CEO satisfied with progress.

news.summary: Retail giant Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT) shared preliminary voting outcomes from its recent Annual Shareholders’ Meeting in Bentonville, Ark. A notable 91.4% of total outstanding shares were accounted for during the event. Doug McMillon, serving as President and CEO, highlighted Walmart's robust performance during fiscal year 2025. McMillon stressed the company's focus on boosting wages, enhancing opportunities, driving innovation, investing in technology, and contributing to community development. He expressed confidence in Walmart's ability to enhance return on investment in conjunction with its ongoing initiatives.
news.headline: Walmart reports 91.4% share representation at 2025 Annual Shareholders' Meeting with strong fiscal results and CEO's focus on investments and community impact.

news.summary: Constellation has recently confirmed that it has obtained regulatory approval from the Public Utility Commission of Texas for the acquisition of Calpine Corporation, marking a significant milestone in the transaction process. This approval allows Constellation to proceed with the acquisition of Calpine Corporation, a move that is poised to greatly impact the energy sector. With this approval in place, Constellation is now positioned to enhance its presence and further solidify its standing within the industry.
news.headline: Constellation receives regulatory approval from Texas for acquisition of Calpine Corporation.

news.summary: In New York, Braze (Nasdaq: BRZE), a top customer engagement platform, revealed its fiscal quarter results ending April 30, 2025. According to Bill Magnuson, Braze's CEO, the company has had a promising start in fiscal year 2026, witnessing substantial revenue growth, profitability, and free cash flow despite market fluctuations. Additionally, Ed McDonnell is set to join Braze in July to oversee various aspects of the business.
news.headline: Braze reports strong Q1 2026 results: revenue growth, profitability, and free cash flow. Ed McDonnell to join as leader.

news.summary: In Utah's Silicon Slopes, Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) revealed its recognition as a top contender in Nucleus Research’s 2025 Business Intelligence (BI) and Analytics Technology Value Matrix, marking its fifth consecutive year achieving this status. Domo was commended for its proficiency in integrating cutting-edge analytics, interactive dashboards, and nearly real-time visualizations to convert data into actionable intelligence. Nucleus Research praised Domo's extensive library of over 1,000 pre-built connectors, which aid in consolidating data sources seamlessly.
news.headline: Domo named leader in 2025 Nucleus Research Analytics Technology Value Matrix - 5th consecutive year. Domo has over 1,000 pre-built connectors.

news.summary: Rubrik, Inc. (NYSE: RBRK), a cyber resilience company based in Palo Alto, California, has reported its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, which ended on April 30, 2025. The company exceeded all guided metrics for the quarter. Bipul Sinha, Rubrik’s CEO and Chairman, expressed satisfaction with the results, emphasizing the impact of their concentrated innovation and operational efforts. Sinha believes they are leading in the cyber resilience market and sees a significant growth opportunity ahead for the company.
news.headline: Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK) reports Q1 fiscal year 2026 results ended April 30, 2025, with outstanding performance exceeding guided metrics.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Sacramento, California, the state Senate passed a bill for a regional electricity system with bipartisan support. This move is similar to the vote on the initial electricity deregulation bill in 1996. The legislation overturns state protections from the Enron era.
news.headline: CA Senate approves legislation for regional electricity deregulation despite concerns. Bipartisan vote, reminiscent of 1996, GOP Senator praises as "big beautiful bill."

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Cincinnati, Staffmark Group, a division of RGF Staffing and Recruit Group, received a Silver Rating from EcoVadis, a leading business sustainability ratings provider. This achievement positions Staffmark Group in the top 15% of more than 130,000 companies assessed.
news.headline: Staffmark Group receives Silver Rating from EcoVadis, top 15% globally in sustainability. 130,000+ companies evaluated.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, a real estate investment trust called Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR), based in Los Angeles, announced its focus on investing in and managing industrial properties across Southern California. The company aims to create value through this venture.
news.headline: Rexford Industrial releases ESG & TCFD reports, focused on investing in industrial properties in SoCal.

news.summary: In a recent announcement in Uniondale, New York on June 5, 2025, ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. (NYSE: ACR) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved the declaration of cash dividends for its Preferred Stock. The Company is set to disburse a cash dividend for its 8.625% Fixed-to-Floating Series C Cumulative.
news.headline: ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. declares cash dividends on its 8.625% Fixed-to-Floating Series C Cumulative Preferred Stock.
